---
title: "George William Bosanquet"
---

## George William Bosanquet

**Dates:** (1845-1869)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1868)

### Biography

He published <i>Essays and Stories by the late G. W. Bosanquet</i> (1870).  CMY’s letter about his contribution is in a collection formed by Elizabeth Bosanquet.  He was staying with the children\'s writer W. H. G. Kingston at the time of the 1861 census.

### Letters

- Letter from [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
